title: Generative AI Hackathon
description: Form teams, build autonomous agent solutions using LLMs, and pitch to leading tech founders for capital.

title: Full Stack MERN Workshop
description: An intensive hands-on session building and deploying high-performance database-driven REST API backends.

title: Agentic AI Developer Webinar
description: Learn the mechanics of multi-agent system coordination using frameworks like LangChain, Autogen, and CrewAI.

title: Smart IoT & Telemetry Hackathon
description: Deploy telemetry data loggers on ESP32 microcontrollers, connect them to MQTT brokers, and design dashboards.

title: Embedded C Firmware Workshop
description: Deep-dive into timer hardware interrupts, peripheral bus routing (I2C, SPI), and real-time operating systems.

title: AI Product Strategy Workshop
description: Master product roadmapping, user testing patterns, and writing data-driven PRDs utilizing AI co-pilots.

title: Advanced Business Analytics Webinar
description: Learn complex cohort query building, database modeling, and operational dash tracking with Tableau.

title: Past Web 3.0 Workshop
